spec_match.rationale: Excellent demonstration of unspokenPunctuation, using a real-time heuristic NLP simulation for typed input and integrating real SpeechRecognition with the property active when supported.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, combining preset loaders, custom input textareas, real-time simulated analysis, mic activation, and dynamic stats badges.

edge_cases.rationale: Outstanding feature-detection and support warning systems that adapt to SpeechRecognition availability and specific property existence.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Flawlessly conforms to design system rules, properly overriding button background and text color variables simultaneously.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/4785284026859520) to the 'see also' section.
